ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gripper_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "gripper_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the robotic gripper ID */,
  "jaw1_force" REAL /* Force applied by jaw 1 in grams */,
  "jaw2_force" REAL /* Force applied by jaw 2 in grams */,
  "time_ms" INTEGER /* Time in milliseconds when the data was recorded */,
  "grip_force" REAL /* Grip force in grams */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test ID */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "gripper_config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific configuration of the gripper used during the test */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the test data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gripper_data_gripper_id FOREIGN KEY ("gripper_id") REFERENCES grippers ("gripper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gripper_data_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gripper_data_gripper_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("gripper_config_id") REFERENCES gripper_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grippers" (
  "gripper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robotic gripper */,
  "gripper_model" INTEGER /* Model of the robotic gripper */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the robotic gripper */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the gripper was installed */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Location where the gripper is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the gripper (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "gripper_config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the default configuration of the gripper */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the gripper */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next maintenance date of the gripper */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., due, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gripper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grippers_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grippers_gripper_model FOREIGN KEY ("gripper_model") REFERENCES gripper_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grippers_gripper_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("gripper_config_id") REFERENCES gripper_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_type" INTEGER /* Type of test (e.g., calibration, operational) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test */,
  "test_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test */,
  "test_location" INTEGER /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who conducted the test */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the test */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Overall results of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_test_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_test_type FOREIGN KEY ("test_type") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_test_location FOREIGN KEY ("test_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., engineer, technician) */,
  "operator_certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the operator */,
  "operator_department" TEXT /* Department the operator belongs to */,
  "operator_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operators_operator_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_supervisor_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Expected duration of the test */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* How often the test should be conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gripper_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gripper model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the gripper model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gripper model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the gripper model */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the model was manufactured */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the gripper model */,
  "model_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., lab, assembly line) */,
  "location_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location (e.g., number of grippers it can handle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record the metric is derived from */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the metric */,
  "metric_version" TEXT /* Version of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gripper_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric type */,
  "metric_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the access event */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gripper_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gripper_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "config_parameters" TEXT /* Detailed parameters of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gripper_data ("data_id")
)
